# PART (a) — gated PARITY, published Jacchia-1971 (SAO SR-332; Montenbruck&Gill 3.42-3.45):
#   J71TEMP f107 f107a kp t_c dt_geo t_inf      [K]
# PART (b) — DOCUMENTATION ONLY, NRLMSISE-00 exospheric-T cross-check (NOT gated):
#   MSISCMP label f107 f107a kp alt_km msis_temp_K j71_t_inf_K   [K]
# PART (b) — CHARACTERISATION, NRLMSISE-00 mass density (pymsis 0.12.0, MSIS v0):
#   MSISDEN label f107 f107a kp alt_km mass_density_kg_m3
# PART (b) — NRLMSISE-00 RATIOS (directional/order-of-magnitude targets, NOT tight-gated):
#   MSISRATIO solarcycle alt_km ratio_max_over_min   (solarmax_quiet / solarmin_quiet)
#   MSISRATIO storm_<solar> alt_km ratio_storm_over_quiet
